scripts.build: vite build && tsup src/server.ts --format esm --platform node --sourcemap --clean --out-dir dist/server --tsconfig ../../tsconfig.base.json --external node:sqlite --external playwright --external playwright-core --external chromium-bidi --external chromium-bidi/* --external axe-core --external lighthouse --external chrome-launcher --external puppeteer-core --external puppeteer-core/* --external ws --external pngjs --external pixelmatch
